args.query:
SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(o.OwnerId, '#', '')) AS OwnerId_clean, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS sales_amt
FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId
WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY OwnerId_clean
ORDER BY sales_amt DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(o.OwnerId, '#', '')) AS OwnerId_clean, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS sales_amt
FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId
WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY OwnerId_clean
ORDER BY sales_amt DESC
LIMIT 1;
